intro:
There is no information about the plant Aquarius inpai. I assume you meant to ask about the plant Aquilaria, more specifically Aquilaria agallocha or Aquilaria malaccensis, also known as Agarwood or Eaglewood. 

The plant Agarwood is a type of resinous heartwood that forms in certain species of trees in the genus Aquilaria. The health benefits of Agarwood include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.

The bioactive constituents of Agarwood include sesquiterpenes, such as agarol, aquilarin, and guaiol, as well as phenolic compounds, like vanillin and eugenol. These constituents contribute to the plant's unique fragrance and medicinal properties.

Agarwood is commonly used in traditional medicine and is often prepared as an essential oil, tea, or tincture. The essential oil of Agarwood is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
